meta.title: Buy and Sell in Morocco | YouSouq
meta.description: Sell your used items in Morocco. Post in seconds via WhatsApp. 100% free, no registration.
meta.keywords: sell used morocco, marketplace morocco, souq morocco, buy sell morocco

hero.title: Buy and sell easily in Morocco 🇲🇦
hero.subtitle: Post your ad in less than 30 seconds. No account. 100% free.

features.instantDesc: Post your ad in less than 30 seconds

search.placeholder: What are you looking for? (car, iPhone, clothes...)

listings.emptyDesc: Be the first to post an ad!

form.title: Post an ad
form.name: Your ad title *
form.disclaimer: No registration • Direct contact via WhatsApp
form.successDesc: Your product is now visible to all buyers.
form.errorPrice: Price must be greater than 0 MAD

footer.description: Buy and sell easily in Morocco

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Your privacy is important to us. This policy explains how we collect and use your data.
privacy.dataText: We only collect data you voluntarily provide: your WhatsApp number, name, product photos and ad description.
privacy.usageText: Your data is used only for:
usageList: Allowing buyers to contact you via WhatsApp
Displaying your ad on the platform
privacy.storageText: Your data is retained as long as your ad is active. You can request deletion at any time.
privacy.sharingText: We never share your personal data with third parties. Your contact info is only visible to interested buyers via WhatsApp.
privacy.rightsText: Under Law 09-08, you have the right to:
privacy.cookiesText: We do not use tracking cookies. The site only uses technical cookies necessary for operation.
privacy.contactText: For any questions about your data, contact us via WhatsApp or email.

form.consent: I accept that my data (WhatsApp number, name) will be used to post my ad and allow buyers to contact me. I understand I can request deletion of my data at any time.
form.consentError: You must accept the terms to post an ad

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.acceptanceText: By using YouSouq, you accept these terms of service.
terms.serviceText: YouSouq is a marketplace platform for posting and viewing used product ads in Morocco. The service is free.
responsibilitiesPoints: Not post illegal or fraudulent content
Use WhatsApp only for legitimate communications
terms.liabilityText: YouSouq acts as a neutral intermediary. We are not responsible for transactions between users.
terms.modificationText: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time.
terms.lawText: These terms are governed by Moroccan law.
